component.name: Ansorum
component.summary: An answer-first compiler for agent-readable and human-readable knowledge

description.p: Ansorum compiles one Markdown answer corpus into human and machine-facing outputs from the same source.
The product direction is answer-first: canonical HTML, canonical Markdown, machine indexes, and governed AI-facing outputs.
This repository still reuses substantial parts of Zola's implementation, but it no longer presents itself as an upstream-compatible Zola release.
Ansorum is being developed around typed answer metadata, machine negotiation, and audit and evaluation loops.
Expand the answer-first reference project and harden runtime behavior.
Ansorum release line reset from inherited Zola numbering.
